description_long: This is an ornate, round wall mirror with a dark bronze or antique gold frame featuring elaborate floral and scrollwork detailing. The frame is thick and richly decorated, with a prominent floral crest at the top and symmetrical flourishes on the sides and bottom. The mirror glass itself is circular and appears slightly darkened, possibly due to age or an antiqued finish. The back of the mirror is plain, showing the solid structure of the frame. The side views reveal the frame's depth and confirm that it is designed to be mounted flush against a wall. This mirror exudes a vintage or classical aesthetic, making it a striking decorative piece.
description: A round, ornately framed wall mirror with dark bronze floral and scrollwork details, featuring an antiqued reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed floral and scrollwork frame and the circular mirror surface.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the frame's depth and confirming its wall-mounted design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back and the solid construction of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the frame's thickness and decorative relief.
attribute_frame_design: Ornate, round frame with floral and scrollwork motifs, made of dark bronze or antique gold metal, highly decorative and classical.
